message:
fix(docs): resolve all 31 rustdoc warnings in frankenterm-core (ft-2n6d5)

Convert unresolved intra-doc links to backtick code spans, escape HTML
angle brackets in doc comments, remove redundant explicit link targets,
and switch unparseable code block from `ignore` to `text`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
